tEn: BLIP3-o: A Family of Fully Open Unified Multimodal Models-Architecture, Training and Dataset
tZh: BLIP3-o：全开放统一多模态模型家族——架构、训练与数据集
sEn: BLIP3-o achieves state-of-the-art performance in both image understanding and generation by using a diffusion transformer to generate CLIP features and a sequential pretraining strategy.
sZh: BLIP3-o通过使用扩散Transformer生成CLIP特征和顺序预训练策略，在图像理解与生成任务上均达到最优性能。
absEn: Unifying image understanding and generation has gained growing attention in recent research on multimodal models. Although design choices for image understanding have been extensively studied, the optimal model architecture and training recipe for a unified framework with image generation remain underexplored. Motivated by the strong potential of autoregressive and diffusion models for high-quality generation and scalability, we conduct a comprehensive study of their use in unified multimodal settings, with emphasis on image representations, modeling objectives, and training strategies. Grounded in these investigations, we introduce a novel approach that employs a diffusion transformer to generate semantically rich CLIP image features, in contrast to conventional VAE-based representations. This design yields both higher training efficiency and improved generative quality. Furthermore, we demonstrate that a sequential pretraining strategy for unified models-first training on image understanding and subsequently on image generation-offers practical advantages by preserving image understanding capability while developing strong image generation ability. Finally, we carefully curate a high-quality instruction-tuning dataset BLIP3o-60k for image generation by prompting GPT-4o with a diverse set of captions covering various scenes, objects, human gestures, and more. Building on our innovative model design, training recipe, and datasets, we develop BLIP3-o, a suite of state-of-the-art unified multimodal models. BLIP3-o achieves superior performance across most of the popular benchmarks spanning both image understanding and generation tasks. To facilitate future research, we fully open-source our models, including code, model weights, training scripts, and pretraining and instruction tuning datasets.
absZh: 统一图像理解与生成在近期多模态模型研究中日益受到关注。尽管图像理解的设计选择已被广泛研究，但针对包含图像生成的统一框架，其最优模型架构和训练方案仍待探索。受自回归模型和扩散模型在高质量生成与可扩展性方面强大潜力的启发，我们对其在统一多模态设置中的应用进行了全面研究，重点关注图像表示、建模目标和训练策略。基于这些研究，我们提出了一种新方法，采用扩散Transformer生成语义丰富的CLIP图像特征，而非传统的基于VAE的表示。该设计同时提高了训练效率和生成质量。此外，我们证明，统一模型的顺序预训练策略——先训练图像理解，再训练图像生成——通过保持图像理解能力同时发展强大的图像生成能力，提供了实际优势。最后，我们精心整理了一个高质量指令微调数据集BLIP3o-60k，用于图像生成，通过使用涵盖各种场景、物体、人类手势等的多样化描述提示GPT-4o生成。基于创新的模型设计、训练方案和数据集，我们开发了BLIP3-o，一套最先进的统一多模态模型。BLIP3-o在大多数流行的图像理解和生成任务基准上均取得了优越性能。为促进未来研究，我们完全开源了模型，包括代码、模型权重、训练脚本以及预训练和指令微调数据集。

contrib.en: First systematic study of autoregressive + diffusion design choices for unified multimodal models.
contrib.zh: 首次系统研究统一多模态模型中自回归+扩散的设计选择。

contrib.en: Proposes CLIP + Flow Matching for image generation, achieving higher training efficiency and quality.
contrib.zh: 提出CLIP+流匹配用于图像生成，实现更高训练效率和质量。

contrib.en: Demonstrates sequential pretraining preserves understanding while enabling generation.
contrib.zh: 证明顺序预训练在保持理解能力的同时实现生成能力。

contrib.en: Curates BLIP3o-60k instruction-tuning dataset improving prompt alignment and aesthetics.
contrib.zh: 整理BLIP3o-60k指令微调数据集，提升提示对齐和美学质量。

contrib.en: BLIP3-o 8B achieves state-of-the-art on multiple image understanding and generation benchmarks.
contrib.zh: BLIP3-o 8B在多个图像理解和生成基准上达到最先进水平。

contrib.en: Fully open-sources models, code, weights, training scripts, and datasets.
contrib.zh: 完全开源模型、代码、权重、训练脚本和数据集。

limits.en: Instruction tuning dataset (60k) cannot fully resolve complex cases like human gestures.
limits.zh: 指令微调数据集（60k）无法完全解决复杂情况，如人体手势。

limits.en: FID metric limitations; GPT-4o scores ~30 on MJHQ-30k, indicating misleading evaluation.
limits.zh: FID指标局限性；GPT-4o在MJHQ-30k上得分约30，表明评估具有误导性。

limits.en: Sequential training may miss synergistic benefits of joint training.
limits.zh: 顺序训练可能错过联合训练的协同效益。

limits.en: Model size and computational cost increase with flow matching and diffusion transformer.
limits.zh: 流匹配和扩散Transformer增加了模型规模和计算成本。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to English prompts and specific benchmarks; generalization to other domains untested.
limits.zh: 评估限于英文提示和特定基准；对其他领域的泛化性未经测试。

items.en: Unifying image understanding and generation has gained growing attention in recent research on multimodal models. Although design choices for image understanding have been extensively studied, the optimal model architecture and training recipe for a unified framework with image generation remain underexplored. Motivated by the strong potential of autoregressive and diffusion models for high-quality generation and scalability, we conduct a comprehensive study of their use in unified multimodal settings, with emphasis on image representations, modeling objectives, and training strategies. Grounded in these investigations, we introduce a novel approach that employs a diffusion transformer to generate semantically rich CLIP image features, in contrast to conventional VAE-based representations. This design yields both higher training efficiency and improved generative quality. Furthermore, we demonstrate that a sequential pretraining strategy for unified models—first training on image understanding and subsequently on image generation—offers practical advantages by preserving image-understanding capability while developing strong image generation ability. Finally, we carefully curate a high-quality instruction-tuning dataset BLIP3o-60k for image generation by prompting GPT-4o with a diverse set of captions covering various scenes, objects, human gestures, and more. Building on our innovative model design, training recipe, and datasets, we develop BLIP3-o, a suite of state-of-the-art unified multimodal models. BLIP3-o achieves superior performance across most of the popular benchmarks spanning both image understanding and generation tasks. To facilitate future research, we fully open-source our models, including code, model weights, training scripts, and pretraining and instruction tuning datasets.
items.zh: 统一图像理解与生成在近期多模态模型研究中日益受到关注。尽管图像理解的设计选择已被广泛研究，但适用于包含图像生成的统一框架的最优模型架构和训练方案仍探索不足。受自回归模型和扩散模型在高质量生成与可扩展性方面强大潜力的启发，我们对其在统一多模态设置中的应用进行了全面研究，重点关注图像表示、建模目标和训练策略。基于这些研究，我们引入了一种新方法，采用扩散Transformer生成语义丰富的CLIP图像特征，而非传统的基于VAE的表示。这一设计同时实现了更高的训练效率和更好的生成质量。此外，我们证明了统一模型的顺序预训练策略——先训练图像理解，再训练图像生成——通过保留图像理解能力同时发展强大的图像生成能力，提供了实际优势。最后，我们通过使用涵盖各种场景、物体、人类手势等的多样化描述提示GPT-4o，精心整理了一个高质量指令微调数据集BLIP3o-60k，用于图像生成。基于我们创新的模型设计、训练方案和数据集，我们开发了BLIP3-o，一系列最先进的统一多模态模型。BLIP3-o在涵盖图像理解和生成任务的大多数流行基准测试中均取得了优越性能。为促进未来研究，我们完全开源了模型，包括代码、模型权重、训练脚本以及预训练和指令微调数据集。

items.capEn: Figure 1: The architecture of BLIP3-o. For image understanding part, we use CLIP to encode the image and compute the cross entropy loss between the target text token and predicted text token. For image generation part, autoregressive model first generates a sequence of intermediate visual features, which are then used as conditioning inputs to a diffusion transformer that generates CLIP image features to approximate the ground-truth CLIP features. By using CLIP encoder, image understanding and image generation share the same semantic space, effectively unifying these two tasks.
items.capZh: 图1：BLIP3-o的架构。对于图像理解部分，我们使用CLIP编码图像，并计算目标文本token与预测文本token之间的交叉熵损失。对于图像生成部分，自回归模型首先生成一系列中间视觉特征，这些特征随后作为条件输入到扩散Transformer中，生成CLIP图像特征以逼近真实CLIP特征。通过使用CLIP编码器，图像理解和图像生成共享相同的语义空间，有效统一了这两项任务。

items.en: Recent advances have demonstrated the potential for unified multimodal representation learning that supports both image understanding and image generation within a single model ge2024seed ; sun2024generative ; xie2024show ; wu2024janus ; chen2025janus ; tong2024metamorph ; pan2025transfer . In this field, despite extensive studies on image understanding, the optimal architecture and training strategy for image generation remain underexplored. The previous debate revolves around two approaches: the first approach quantizes continuous visual features into discrete tokens and models them as categorical distribution team2024chameleon ; wang2024emu3 ; ma2025token ; the second approach generates intermediate visual features or latent representations via the autoregressive model and then conditions on these visual features to generate images through the diffusion model tong2024metamorph ; pan2025transfer . The recently released GPT-4o image generation gpt4o was implied to adopt a hybrid architecture with autoregressive and diffusion models following the second approach gpt4o ; yan2025gpt . Therefore, we were inspired to present a systematic study of design choices in a similar way. Specifically, our investigation focuses on three key design axes: (1) image representations - whether to encode the images into low-level pixel features (e.g., from VAE-based encoders) or high-level semantic features (e.g., from CLIP image encoders); (2) training objectives - Mean Squared Error (MSE) versus Flow Matching lipman2022flow ; RectifiedFlow , and what their impacts on training efficiency and generation quality; (3) training strategies - joint multitask training on image understanding and generation like Metamorph tong2024metamorph or sequential training like LMFusion shi2024llamafusion and MetaQuery pan2025transfer , where the model is first trained for understanding and then extended for generation.
items.zh: 近期进展已展示了统一多模态表示学习的潜力，该学习能在单个模型中同时支持图像理解和图像生成ge2024seed ; sun2024generative ; xie2024show ; wu2024janus ; chen2025janus ; tong2024metamorph ; pan2025transfer 。在该领域，尽管图像理解已被广泛研究，但图像生成的最优架构和训练策略仍探索不足。先前的争论围绕两种方法：第一种方法将连续视觉特征量化为离散token，并将其建模为类别分布team2024chameleon ; wang2024emu3 ; ma2025token ；第二种方法通过自回归模型生成中间视觉特征或潜在表示，然后以这些视觉特征为条件，通过扩散模型生成图像tong2024metamorph ; pan2025transfer 。最近发布的GPT-4o图像生成gpt4o被暗示采用了自回归和扩散模型的混合架构，遵循第二种方法gpt4o ; yan2025gpt 。因此，我们受到启发，以类似方式对设计选择进行系统研究。具体而言，我们的研究聚焦于三个关键设计轴：（1）图像表示——是将图像编码为低级像素特征（例如，来自基于VAE的编码器）还是高级语义特征（例如，来自CLIP图像编码器）；（2）训练目标——均方误差（MSE）与流匹配lipman2022flow ; RectifiedFlow ，以及它们对训练效率和生成质量的影响；（3）训练策略——像Metamorph tong2024metamorph 那样的图像理解和生成联合多任务训练，或像LMFusion shi2024llamafusion 和MetaQuery pan2025transfer 那样的顺序训练，即模型先训练理解，再扩展用于生成。

items.en: Our findings reveal that CLIP image features offer more compact and informative representations than VAE features, resulting in both faster training and higher image generation quality. Flow matching loss proves to be more effective than MSE loss, enabling more diverse image sampling and yielding better image quality. Furthermore, we find that a sequential training strategy—first training the autoregressive model on image understanding tasks, then freezing it during training on image generation—achieves the best overall performance. Based on these findings, we develop BLIP3-o, a herd of state-of-the-art unified multimodal models. BLIP3-o leverages diffusion transformer and flow matching on CLIP features (Figure 1) and is sequentially trained on image understanding and image generation tasks. To further improve visual aesthetic and instruction following abilities, we carefully curate a 60k high-quality instruction-tuning dataset BLIP3o-60k for image generation, by prompting GPT-4o with a diverse set of prompts spanning scenes, objects, human gestures and more. We observe that supervised instruction tuning on BLIP3o-60k significantly enhances the alignment of BLIP3-o with human preference and improves the aesthetic quality.
items.zh: 我们的发现表明，CLIP图像特征比VAE特征提供更紧凑且信息更丰富的表示，从而带来更快的训练速度和更高的图像生成质量。流匹配损失被证明比MSE损失更有效，能够实现更多样化的图像采样并产生更好的图像质量。此外，我们发现顺序训练策略——先在图像理解任务上训练自回归模型，然后在图像生成训练期间冻结它——取得了最佳整体性能。基于这些发现，我们开发了BLIP3-o，一系列最先进的统一多模态模型。BLIP3-o利用CLIP特征上的扩散Transformer和流匹配（图1），并在图像理解和图像生成任务上顺序训练。为了进一步提升视觉美学和指令遵循能力，我们通过使用涵盖场景、物体、人类手势等的多样化提示提示GPT-4o，精心整理了一个60k高质量指令微调数据集BLIP3o-60k，用于图像生成。我们观察到，在BLIP3o-60k上进行监督指令微调显著增强了BLIP3-o与人类偏好的对齐，并提高了美学质量。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Visualization results of BLIP3-o 8B at 1024×1024 resolution.
items.capZh: 图2：BLIP3-o 8B在1024×1024分辨率下的可视化结果。

items.en: In our experiments, BLIP3-o achieves superior performance across most of the popular benchmarks for image understanding and image generation, with the 8B model scoring 1682.6 on MME-P, 50.6 on MMMU and 0.84 on GenEval. To support further research and keep the mission of open-source foundation model research like BLIP-3 blip3 , we fully open-source our models including model weights, code, pretraining and instruction-tuning datasets, and evaluation pipelines. We hope that our work will support the research community and drive continued progress in the unified multimodal domain.
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，BLIP3-o在图像理解和图像生成的大多数流行基准测试中取得了优越性能，其中8B模型在MME-P上得分为1682.6，在MMMU上得分为50.6，在GenEval上得分为0.84。为了支持进一步研究并保持像BLIP-3 blip3 那样的开源基础模型研究使命，我们完全开源了模型，包括模型权重、代码、预训练和指令微调数据集以及评估流程。我们希望我们的工作能够支持研究社区，并推动统一多模态领域的持续进步。

items.en: The development of unified multimodal architectures that jointly support both image understanding and generation has emerged as a promising direction in recent research. Models such as Janus chen2025janus , Show-o xie2024show , MetaMorph tong2024metamorph , Janus-Pro chen2025janus , and LMFusion shi2024llamafusion exemplify early efforts to bridge image understanding and generation within a single framework. More recently, OpenAI’s GPT-4o gpt4o has further sparked interest in this paradigm by demonstrating impressive capabilities in both high-quality image generation and strong multimodal understanding. Despite this growing interest, the underlying design principles and training strategies that enable such unified capabilities remain underexplored. This work aims to systematically investigate and advance the development of unified models, and we begin by clearly presenting the key motivations for building unified multimodal model.
items.zh: 统一多模态架构的发展，即同时支持图像理解和生成，已成为近期研究中的一个有前景的方向。诸如Janus chen2025janus 、Show-o xie2024show 、MetaMorph tong2024metamorph 、Janus-Pro chen2025janus 和LMFusion shi2024llamafusion 等模型代表了在单一框架内桥接图像理解和生成的早期努力。最近，OpenAI的GPT-4o gpt4o 通过展示在高质量图像生成和强大多模态理解方面的令人印象深刻的能力，进一步激发了人们对这一范式的兴趣。尽管兴趣日益增长，但实现这种统一能力的基本设计原则和训练策略仍探索不足。本工作旨在系统性地研究和推进统一模型的发展，我们首先清晰阐述构建统一多模态模型的关键动机。

items.en: Integrating image generation capabilities into autoregressive models such as Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) offers the potential to inherit their pretrained knowledge, reasoning capability and instruction following ability. For example, our model is able to interpret prompts, such as “An animal with a long nose”, without requiring prompt rewriting. This demonstrates a level of reasoning capability and world knowledge that traditional image generation models struggle to achieve. Beyond reasoning, the instruction-following capabilities of MLLMs are expected to carry over to the image generation process when incorporated into a unified architecture.
items.zh: 将图像生成能力集成到自回归模型（如多模态大语言模型（MLLM））中，有可能继承其预训练知识、推理能力和指令遵循能力。例如，我们的模型能够解释诸如“一种长鼻子的动物”之类的提示，而无需提示重写。这展示了传统图像生成模型难以达到的推理能力和世界知识水平。除了推理能力，MLLM的指令遵循能力在集成到统一架构中时，有望延续到图像生成过程中。

items.en: Unified models that jointly support image understanding and generation naturally facilitate in-context learning capabilities. In such models, previously generated multimodal outputs can serve as context for subsequent generation, enabling seamless support for iterative image editing, visual dialogue, and step-by-step visual reasoning. This eliminates the need for mode switching or reliance on external processing pipelines, allowing the model to maintain coherence and task continuity.
items.zh: 同时支持图像理解和生成的统一模型自然促进了上下文学习能力。在此类模型中，先前生成的多模态输出可以作为后续生成的上下文，从而无缝支持迭代图像编辑、视觉对话和逐步视觉推理。这消除了模式切换或依赖外部处理流程的需要，使模型能够保持连贯性和任务连续性。

items.en: As artificial intelligence advances toward artificial general intelligence (AGI), future systems need to go beyond text-based capabilities to seamlessly perceive, interpret, and generate multimodal content. Achieving this requires a shift from text-only architectures to unified multimodal architectures that can reason and generate across diverse modalities. Such models are essential for building general-purpose intelligence capable of engaging with the world in a holistic, human-like manner.
items.zh: 随着人工智能向通用人工智能（AGI）迈进，未来的系统需要超越基于文本的能力，无缝感知、解释和生成多模态内容。实现这一目标需要从纯文本架构转向能够跨多种模态进行推理和生成的统一多模态架构。此类模型对于构建能够以整体、类人方式与世界互动的通用智能至关重要。

items.en: Driven by these motivations, we explore the development of a unified model that jointly supports image understanding and generation tasks in the following sections.
items.zh: 受这些动机驱动，我们在以下部分探索开发一个同时支持图像理解和生成任务的统一模型。

items.en: indicating that autoregressive and diffusion models may be jointly leveraged to combine the strengths of both modules. Motivated by this hybrid design, we adopt an autoregressive + diffusion framework in our study. However, the optimal architecture in this framework remains unclear. The autoregressive model produces continuous intermediate visual features intended to approximate ground-truth image representations, raising two key questions. First, what should serve as the ground-truth embeddings: should we use a VAE or CLIP to encode images into continuous features? Second, once the autoregressive model generates visual features, how do we optimally align them with the ground-truth image features, or more generally, how should we model the distribution of these continuous visual features: via a simple MSE loss, or by employing a diffusion-based approach? Thus, we conduct a comprehensive exploration of various design choices in the following section.
items.zh: 这表明自回归模型和扩散模型可能被联合利用，以结合两者的优势。受这种混合设计的启发，我们在研究中采用了自回归+扩散框架。然而，该框架中的最优架构仍不清楚。自回归模型生成连续的中间视觉特征，旨在逼近真实图像表示，这引发了两个关键问题。首先，什么应作为真实嵌入：我们应该使用VAE还是CLIP将图像编码为连续特征？其次，一旦自回归模型生成视觉特征，我们如何最优地将它们与真实图像特征对齐，或者更一般地说，如何对这些连续视觉特征的分布进行建模：通过简单的MSE损失，还是采用基于扩散的方法？因此，我们在下一节中对各种设计选择进行全面探索。

full.secZh: 3 统一多模态中的图像生成

items.en: In this section, we discuss the design choices involved in building the image generation model within a unified multimodal framework. We begin by exploring how images can be represented as continuous embeddings through encoder–decoder architectures, which play a foundational role in learning efficiency and generation quality.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们讨论在统一多模态框架内构建图像生成模型所涉及的设计选择。我们首先探讨如何通过编码器-解码器架构将图像表示为连续嵌入，这在学习效率和生成质量中起着基础性作用。

items.en: Image generation typically begins by encoding an image into a continuous latent embedding using an encoder, followed by a decoder that reconstructs the image from this latent embedding. This encoding-decoding pipeline can effectively reduce the dimensionality of the input space in image generation, facilitating efficient training. In the following, we discuss two widely used encoder–decoder paradigms.
items.zh: 图像生成通常首先使用编码器将图像编码为连续潜在嵌入，然后使用解码器从该潜在嵌入重建图像。这种编码-解码流程可以有效降低图像生成中输入空间的维度，促进高效训练。下面，我们讨论两种广泛使用的编码器-解码器范式。

items.en: Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) kingma2013auto ; rezende2014stochastic are a class of generative models that learn to encode images into a structured, continuous latent space. The encoder approximates the posterior distribution over the latent variables given the input image, while the decoder reconstructs the image from samples drawn from this latent distribution. Latent diffusion models build on this framework by learning to model the distribution of compressed latent representations, rather than raw image pixels. By operating in the VAE latent space, these models significantly reduce the dimensionality of the output space, thereby lowering computational costs and enabling more efficient training. After the denoising steps, the VAE decoder maps the generated latent embeddings into raw image pixels.
items.zh: 变分自编码器（VAE）kingma2013auto ; rezende2014stochastic 是一类生成模型，学习将图像编码到结构化的连续潜在空间。编码器近似给定输入图像下潜在变量的后验分布，而解码器从该潜在分布中抽取的样本重建图像。潜在扩散模型在此基础上构建，通过学习建模压缩潜在表示的分布，而非原始图像像素。通过在VAE潜在空间中操作，这些模型显著降低了输出空间的维度，从而降低了计算成本并实现了更高效的训练。在去噪步骤之后，VAE解码器将生成的潜在嵌入映射为原始图像像素。

items.en: CLIP radford2021learning models have become foundational encoders for image understanding tasks liu2023visual , owing to its strong ability to extract rich, high-level semantic features from images through contrastive training on large-scale image–text pairs. However, leveraging these features for image generation remains a non-trivial challenge, as CLIP was not originally designed for reconstruction tasks. Emu2 sun2024generative presents a practical solution by pairing a CLIP-based encoder with a diffusion-based decoder. Specifically, it uses EVA-CLIP to encode images into continuous visual embeddings and reconstructs them via a diffusion model initialized from SDXL-base podell2023sdxl . During training, the diffusion decoder is fine-tuned to use the visual embeddings from EVA-CLIP as conditions to recover the original image from Gaussian noise, while the EVA-CLIP remains frozen. This process effectively combines the CLIP and diffusion models into an image autoencoder: the CLIP encoder compresses an image into semantically rich latent embeddings, and the diffusion-based decoder reconstructs the image from these embeddings. Notably, although the decoder is based on diffusion architecture, it is trained with a reconstruction loss rather than probabilistic sampling objectives. Consequently, during inference, the model performs deterministic reconstruction.
items.zh: CLIP radford2021learning 模型已成为图像理解任务的基础编码器liu2023visual ，这得益于其通过在大规模图像-文本对上进行对比训练，提取丰富、高级语义特征的强大能力。然而，利用这些特征进行图像生成仍然是一个不小的挑战，因为CLIP最初并非为重建任务设计。Emu2 sun2024generative 通过将基于CLIP的编码器与基于扩散的解码器配对，提出了一种实用解决方案。具体而言，它使用EVA-CLIP将图像编码为连续视觉嵌入，并通过从SDXL-base podell2023sdxl 初始化的扩散模型重建它们。在训练期间，扩散解码器被微调，以使用来自EVA-CLIP的视觉嵌入作为条件，从高斯噪声中恢复原始图像，而EVA-CLIP保持冻结。这个过程有效地将CLIP和扩散模型组合成一个图像自编码器：CLIP编码器将图像压缩为语义丰富的潜在嵌入，基于扩散的解码器从这些嵌入重建图像。值得注意的是，尽管解码器基于扩散架构，但它使用重建损失而非概率采样目标进行训练。因此，在推理期间，模型执行确定性重建。

items.en: These two encoder–decoder architectures, i.e., VAEs and CLIP-Diffusion, represent distinct paradigms for image encoding and reconstruction, each offering specific advantages and trade-offs. VAEs encode the image into low-level pixel features and offer better reconstruction quality. Furthermore, VAEs are widely available as off-the-shelf models and can be integrated directly into image generation training pipelines. In contrast, CLIP-Diffusion requires additional training to adapt the diffusion models to various CLIP encoders. However, CLIP-Diffusion architectures offer significant benefits in terms of image compression ratio. For example, in both Emu2 sun2024generative and our experiments, each image regardless of its resolution can be encoded into a fixed length of 64 continuous vectors, providing both compact and semantically rich latent embeddings. By contrast, VAE-based encoders tend to produce a longer sequence of latent embeddings for higher-resolution inputs, which increases the computational burden in the training procedure.
items.zh: 这两种编码器-解码器架构，即VAE和CLIP-扩散，代表了图像编码和重建的不同范式，各自具有特定的优势和权衡。VAE将图像编码为低级像素特征，并提供更好的重建质量。此外，VAE作为现成模型广泛可用，可以直接集成到图像生成训练流程中。相比之下，CLIP-扩散需要额外训练以适应不同的CLIP编码器。然而，CLIP-扩散架构在图像压缩比方面提供了显著优势。例如，在Emu2 sun2024generative 和我们的实验中，无论图像分辨率如何，每张图像都可以编码为固定长度的64个连续向量，提供既紧凑又语义丰富的潜在嵌入。相比之下，基于VAE的编码器倾向于为更高分辨率的输入产生更长的潜在嵌入序列，这增加了训练过程中的计算负担。

items.en: After obtaining continuous image embeddings, we proceed to model them using autoregressive architectures. Given a user prompt (e.g., “A young woman with freckles wearing a straw hat.”), we first encode the prompt into a sequence of embedding vectors 𝐂\mathbf{C} using the autoregressive model’s input embedding layer, and append a learnable query vector 𝐐\mathbf{Q} to 𝐂\mathbf{C}, where 𝐐\mathbf{Q} is randomly initialized and optimized during training. As the combined sequence [𝐂;𝐐][\mathbf{C};\mathbf{Q}] is processed through the autoregressive transformer, 𝐐\mathbf{Q} learns to attend to and extract relevant semantic information from the prompt 𝐂\mathbf{C}. The resulting 𝐐\mathbf{Q} is interpreted as the intermediate visual features or latent representation generated by the autoregressive model, and is trained to approximate the ground-truth image feature 𝐗\mathbf{X} (obtained from VAE or CLIP). In the following, we introduce two training objectives: Mean Squared Error (MSE) and Flow Matching, for learning to align 𝐐\mathbf{Q} with the ground-truth image embedding 𝐗\mathbf{X}.
items.zh: 在获得连续图像嵌入后，我们继续使用自回归架构对其进行建模。给定用户提示（例如，“一位面带雀斑、戴着草帽的年轻女性。”），我们首先使用自回归模型的输入嵌入层将提示编码为嵌入向量序列C，并在C后附加一个可学习的查询向量Q，其中Q是随机初始化并在训练中优化的。当组合序列[C; Q]通过自回归Transformer处理时，Q学习关注并从提示C中提取相关语义信息。得到的Q被解释为自回归模型生成的中间视觉特征或潜在表示，并被训练以逼近真实图像特征X（从VAE或CLIP获得）。下面，我们介绍两种训练目标：均方误差（MSE）和流匹配，用于学习将Q与真实图像嵌入X对齐。

items.en: The Mean Squared Error (MSE) loss is a straightforward and widely used objective for learning continuous image embeddings ge2024seed ; sun2024generative . Given the predicted visual features 𝐐\mathbf{Q} produced by the autoregressive model and the ground-truth image features 𝐗\mathbf{X}, we first apply a learnable linear projection to align the dimensionality of 𝐐\mathbf{Q} with that of 𝐗\mathbf{X}. The MSE loss is then formulated as:

items.zh: 其中 𝐖\mathbf{W} 表示可学习的投影矩阵。

items.en: Note that using MSE loss only aligns the predicted image features 𝐐\mathbf{Q} with the mean value of the target distribution. An ideal training objective would model the probability distribution of continuous image representation. We propose to use flow matching FlowMatching , a diffusion framework that can sample from a target continuous distribution by iterative transporting samples from a prior distribution (e.g., Gaussian). Given a ground-truth image feature 𝐗1\mathbf{X}_{1} and the condition 𝐐\mathbf{Q} encoded by an autoregressive model, at each training step, we sample a timestep t∼𝒰​(0,1)t\sim\mathcal{U}(0,1), and noise 𝐗0∼𝒩​(0,1)\mathbf{X}_{0}\sim\mathcal{N}(0,1). Then diffusion transformer learns to predict the velocity 𝐕t=d​𝐗td​t\mathbf{V}_{t}=\frac{d\mathbf{X}_{t}}{dt} at the timestep tt conditioned on 𝐐\mathbf{Q}, in the direction of 𝐗1\mathbf{X}_{1}. Following previous work RectifiedFlow , we compute 𝐗t\mathbf{X}_{t} by a simple linear interpolation between 𝐗0\mathbf{X}_{0} and 𝐗1\mathbf{X}_{1}:
items.zh: 注意，仅使用 MSE 损失会使预测的图像特征 𝐐\mathbf{Q} 与目标分布的均值对齐。理想的训练目标应建模连续图像表示的概率分布。我们提出使用流匹配（Flow Matching），这是一种扩散框架，通过从先验分布（如高斯分布）迭代传输样本，可以从目标连续分布中采样。给定真实图像特征 𝐗1\mathbf{X}_{1} 和自回归模型编码的条件 𝐐\mathbf{Q}，在每个训练步骤中，我们采样时间步 t∼𝒰​(0,1)t\sim\mathcal{U}(0,1) 和噪声 𝐗0∼𝒩​(0,1)\mathbf{X}_{0}\sim\mathcal{N}(0,1)。然后扩散 Transformer 学习在时间步 tt 以 𝐐\mathbf{Q} 为条件，预测沿 𝐗1\mathbf{X}_{1} 方向的速度 𝐕t=d​𝐗td​t\mathbf{V}_{t}=\frac{d\mathbf{X}_{t}}{dt}。遵循先前工作 RectifiedFlow，我们通过 𝐗0\mathbf{X}_{0} 和 𝐗1\mathbf{X}_{1} 之间的简单线性插值计算 𝐗t\mathbf{X}_{t}：

items.en: Unlike discrete tokens, which inherently support sampling-based strategies for exploring diverse generation paths, continuous representations lack this property. Specifically, under an MSE-based training objective, the predicted visual features 𝐐\mathbf{Q} becomes nearly deterministic for a given prompt. As a result, the output images, regardless of whether the visual decoder is based on VAEs or CLIP + Diffusion architectures, remain almost identical across multiple inference runs. This determinism highlights a key limitation of the MSE objective: it constrains the model to produce a single, fixed output for each prompt, thereby limiting generation diversity.
items.zh: 与离散 token 不同（离散 token 天然支持基于采样的策略以探索多样化的生成路径），连续表示缺乏这一特性。具体而言，在基于 MSE 的训练目标下，对于给定提示，预测的视觉特征 𝐐\mathbf{Q} 几乎是确定性的。因此，无论视觉解码器基于 VAE 还是 CLIP + 扩散架构，输出图像在多次推理运行中几乎保持不变。这种确定性凸显了 MSE 目标的一个关键限制：它约束模型为每个提示生成单一固定输出，从而限制了生成多样性。

items.en: In contrast, the flow matching framework enables the model to inherit the stochasticity of the diffusion process. This allows the model to generate diverse image samples conditioned on the same prompt, facilitating broader exploration of the output space. However, this flexibility comes at the cost of increased model complexity. Flow matching introduces additional learnable parameters compared to MSE. In our implementation, we use a diffusion transformer (DiT), and empirically find that scaling its capacity yields significant performance improvements.
items.zh: 相比之下，流匹配框架使模型能够继承扩散过程的随机性。这使得模型能够在相同提示条件下生成多样化的图像样本，促进输出空间的更广泛探索。然而，这种灵活性以增加模型复杂度为代价。与 MSE 相比，流匹配引入了额外的可学习参数。在我们的实现中，我们使用扩散 Transformer（DiT），并经验性地发现扩展其容量可带来显著的性能提升。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Three design choices for image generation in unified multimodal model. All designs use a Autoregressive + Diffusion framework but vary in their image generation components. For the flow matching loss, we keep the autoregressive model frozen and only fine-tune the image generation module to preserve the model’s language capabilities.
items.capZh: 图 3：统一多模态模型中图像生成的三种设计选择。所有设计均采用自回归 + 扩散框架，但图像生成组件不同。对于流匹配损失，我们冻结自回归模型，仅微调图像生成模块以保留模型的语言能力。

items.en: The combination of different image encoder–decoder architectures and training objectives gives rise to a range of design choices for image generation models. These design choices, illustrated in Figure 3, significantly influence both the quality and controllability of the generated images. In this section, we summarize and analyze the trade-offs introduced by different encoder types (e.g., VAEs vs. CLIP encoders) and loss functions (e.g., MSE vs. Flow Matching).
items.zh: 不同的图像编码器-解码器架构和训练目标的组合，为图像生成模型带来了多种设计选择。这些设计选择如图 3 所示，显著影响生成图像的质量和可控性。在本节中，我们总结并分析了不同编码器类型（如 VAE 与 CLIP 编码器）和损失函数（如 MSE 与流匹配）带来的权衡。

items.en: Following Emu2 sun2024generative , Seed-X ge2024seed and Metamorph tong2024metamorph , we use CLIP to encode images into 64 fixed-length semantic-rich visual embeddings. The autoregressive model is trained to minimize the Mean Squared Error (MSE) loss between the predicted visual features 𝐐\mathbf{Q} and the ground-truth CLIP embedding 𝐗\mathbf{X}, as illustrated in Figure 3(a). During inference, given a text prompt 𝐂\mathbf{C}, the autoregressive model predicts the latent visual features 𝐐\mathbf{Q}, which is subsequently passed to a diffusion-based visual decoder to reconstruct the real image.
items.zh: 遵循 Emu2、Seed-X 和 Metamorph，我们使用 CLIP 将图像编码为 64 个固定长度的语义丰富的视觉嵌入。自回归模型训练以最小化预测视觉特征 𝐐\mathbf{Q} 与真实 CLIP 嵌入 𝐗\mathbf{X} 之间的均方误差（MSE）损失，如图 3(a) 所示。推理时，给定文本提示 𝐂\mathbf{C}，自回归模型预测潜在视觉特征 𝐐\mathbf{Q}，随后传递给基于扩散的视觉解码器以重建真实图像。

items.en: As an alternative to MSE loss, we employ flow matching loss to train the model to predict ground-truth CLIP embeddings, as illustrated in Figure 3(b). Given a prompt 𝐂\mathbf{C}, the autoregressive model generates a sequence of visual features 𝐐\mathbf{Q}. These features are used as conditions to guide the diffusion process, yielding a predicted CLIP embedding to approximate the ground-truth CLIP features. In essence, the inference pipeline involves two diffusion stages: the first uses the conditioning visual features 𝐐\mathbf{Q} to iteratively denoise into CLIP embeddings. And the second converts these CLIP embeddings into real images by diffusion-based visual decoder. This approach enables stochastic sampling at the first stage, allowing for greater diversity in image generation.
items.zh: 作为 MSE 损失的替代方案，我们采用流匹配损失训练模型以预测真实 CLIP 嵌入，如图 3(b) 所示。给定提示 𝐂\mathbf{C}，自回归模型生成一系列视觉特征 𝐐\mathbf{Q}。这些特征作为条件引导扩散过程，产生预测的 CLIP 嵌入以逼近真实 CLIP 特征。本质上，推理流程涉及两个扩散阶段：第一阶段使用条件视觉特征 𝐐\mathbf{Q} 迭代去噪为 CLIP 嵌入；第二阶段通过基于扩散的视觉解码器将这些 CLIP 嵌入转换为真实图像。这种方法在第一阶段实现随机采样，从而允许图像生成具有更大的多样性。

items.en: We can also use flow matching loss to predict the ground truth VAE features seen in Figure 3(c), which is similar to MetaQuery pan2025transfer . At inference time, given a prompt 𝐂\mathbf{C}, the autoregressive model produces visual features 𝐐\mathbf{Q}. Then, conditioning on 𝐐\mathbf{Q} and iteratively removing noise at each step, the real images are generated by the VAE decoder.
items.zh: 我们也可以使用流匹配损失预测真实 VAE 特征，如图 3(c) 所示，类似于 MetaQuery。推理时，给定提示 𝐂\mathbf{C}，自回归模型产生视觉特征 𝐐\mathbf{Q}。然后，以 𝐐\mathbf{Q} 为条件并逐步去除噪声，通过 VAE 解码器生成真实图像。

items.en: Because our focus is on autoregressive + diffusion framework, we exclude VAE + MSE approaches, as they do not incorporate any diffusion module.
items.zh: 由于我们关注自回归 + 扩散框架，因此排除了 VAE + MSE 方法，因为它们不包含任何扩散模块。

items.en: To compare various design choices, we use Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct as autoregressive model. Our training data consists of CC12M changpinyo2021conceptual , SA-1B kirillov2023segment , and JourneyDB JourneyDB , amounting to approximately 25 million samples. For CC12M and SA-1B, we utilize the detailed captions generated by LLaVA, while for JourneyDB we use the original captions. The detailed description of image generation architecture using flow matching loss is provided in Section 5.1.
items.zh: 为了比较各种设计选择，我们使用 Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct 作为自回归模型。训练数据包括 CC12M、SA-1B 和 JourneyDB，总计约 2500 万样本。对于 CC12M 和 SA-1B，我们使用 LLaVA 生成的详细描述，而对于 JourneyDB，我们使用原始描述。使用流匹配损失的图像生成架构的详细描述见第 5.1 节。

items.en: We report the FID score heusel2017gans on MJHQ-30k li2024playground for visual aesthetic quality, along with GenEval ghosh2023geneval and DPG-Bench hu2024ella metrics for evaluating prompt alignment. We plot the results for each design choice at approximately every 3,200 training steps. Figure 4 shows that CLIP + Flow Matching achieves the best prompt alignment scores on both GenEval and DPG-Bench, while VAE + Flow Matching produces the lowest (best) FID, indicating superior aesthetic quality. However, FID has inherent limitations: it quantifies stylistic deviation from the target image distribution and often overlooks true generative quality and prompt alignment. In fact, our FID evaluation of GPT-4o on the MJHQ-30k dataset produced a score of around 30.0, underscoring that FID can be misleading in the image generation evaluation. In general, our experiments demonstrate CLIP + Flow Matching as the most effective design choice.
items.zh: 我们报告了 MJHQ-30k 上的 FID 分数（用于视觉美学质量），以及 GenEval 和 DPG-Bench 指标（用于评估提示对齐）。我们大约每 3200 训练步绘制每种设计选择的结果。图 4 显示，CLIP + 流匹配在 GenEval 和 DPG-Bench 上均取得了最佳的提示对齐分数，而 VAE + 流匹配产生了最低（最佳）的 FID，表明其美学质量更优。然而，FID 存在固有局限性：它量化了与目标图像分布的风格偏差，往往忽略真实的生成质量和提示对齐。事实上，我们在 MJHQ-30k 数据集上对 GPT-4o 的 FID 评估得分约为 30.0，这强调了 FID 在图像生成评估中可能具有误导性。总体而言，我们的实验表明 CLIP + 流匹配是最有效的设计选择。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Comparison of different design choices.
items.capZh: 图 4：不同设计选择的比较。

items.en: In this section, we present a comprehensive evaluation of various design choices for image generation within a unified multimodal framework. Our results clearly show that CLIP’s features produce more compact and semantically rich representations than VAE features, yielding higher training efficiency. Autoregressive models more effectively learn these semantic-level features compared to pixel-level features. Furthermore, flow matching proves to be a more effective training objective for modeling the image distribution, resulting in greater sample diversity and enhanced visual quality.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们对统一多模态框架内图像生成的各种设计选择进行了全面评估。我们的结果清楚地表明，CLIP 的特征比 VAE 特征产生更紧凑且语义更丰富的表示，从而带来更高的训练效率。自回归模型相比像素级特征更有效地学习这些语义级特征。此外，流匹配被证明是建模图像分布更有效的训练目标，从而带来更大的样本多样性和增强的视觉质量。

full.secZh: 4 统一多模态的训练策略

items.capEn: Figure 5: Joint Training vs. Sequential Training: Joint training performs multitask learning by mixing image-understanding and image-generation data, updating both the autoregressive backbone and the generation module simultaneously. Sequential training separates the process: first, the model is trained only on image-understanding tasks; then the autoregressive backbone is frozen and only the image-generation module is trained in a second stage.
items.capZh: 图 5：联合训练与顺序训练：联合训练通过混合图像理解和图像生成数据执行多任务学习，同时更新自回归主干和生成模块。顺序训练将过程分开：首先，模型仅在图像理解任务上训练；然后冻结自回归主干，仅在第二阶段训练图像生成模块。

items.en: Building on our image generation study, the next step is to develop a unified model that can perform both image understanding and image generation. We use CLIP + Flow Matching for the image generation module. Since image understanding also operates in CLIP’s embedding space, we align both tasks within the same semantic space, enabling their unification. In this context, we discuss two training strategies to achieve this integration.
items.zh: 基于我们的图像生成研究，下一步是开发一个能够同时执行图像理解和图像生成的统一模型。我们使用 CLIP + 流匹配作为图像生成模块。由于图像理解也在 CLIP 的嵌入空间中操作，我们将两个任务对齐到同一语义空间，从而实现它们的统一。在此背景下，我们讨论了实现这种集成的两种训练策略。

items.en: Joint training of image understanding and image generation has become a common practice in recent works such as Metamorph tong2024metamorph , Janus-Pro chen2025janus , and Show-o xie2024show . Although these methods adopt different architectures for image generation, all perform multitask learning by mixing data for image generation and understanding.
items.zh: 图像理解和图像生成的联合训练已成为近期工作中的常见做法，例如 Metamorph、Janus-Pro 和 Show-o。尽管这些方法采用不同的图像生成架构，但都通过混合图像生成和理解数据来执行多任务学习。

items.en: Instead of training image understanding and generation together, we follow a two-stage approach. In the first stage, we train only the image understanding module. In the second stage, we freeze the MLLM backbone, and train only the image generation module like LMFusion shi2024llamafusion and MetaQuery pan2025transfer .
items.zh: 我们没有将图像理解与生成联合训练，而是采用两阶段方法。第一阶段，仅训练图像理解模块。第二阶段，冻结多模态大语言模型（MLLM）主干，仅训练图像生成模块，类似于LMFusion shi2024llamafusion和MetaQuery pan2025transfer。

items.en: In joint training setting, although image understanding and generation tasks possibly benefit each other as demonstrated by Metamorph tong2024metamorph , two critical factors influence their synergistic effect: (i) the total data size and (ii) the data ratio between image understanding and generation data. In contrast, sequential training offers greater flexibility: It lets us freeze the autoregressive backbone and maintain the image understanding capability. We can dedicate all training capacity to image generation, avoiding any inter-task effects in joint training. Also motivated by LMFusion shi2024llamafusion and MetaQuery pan2025transfer , we will choose sequential training to construct our unified multimodal model and defer joint training to future work.
items.zh: 在联合训练设置中，尽管如图Metamorph tong2024metamorph所示，图像理解和生成任务可能相互促进，但有两个关键因素影响其协同效应：(i) 总数据量，以及(ii) 图像理解与生成数据之间的数据比例。相比之下，顺序训练提供了更大的灵活性：它允许我们冻结自回归主干并保持图像理解能力，将所有训练能力专用于图像生成，避免了联合训练中的任务间干扰。同样受LMFusion shi2024llamafusion和MetaQuery pan2025transfer启发，我们将选择顺序训练来构建统一的模态模型，并将联合训练留待未来工作。

full.secZh: 5 BLIP3-o：最先进的统一多模态模型

items.en: Based on our findings, we adopt CLIP + Flow Matching and sequential training to develop our own state-of-the-art unified multimodal model BLIP3-o.
items.zh: 基于我们的发现，我们采用CLIP + Flow Matching和顺序训练来开发我们自己的最先进统一模态模型BLIP3-o。

items.en: We develop two different size models: 8B parameter model trained on proprietary data and 4B parameter model using only open source data. Given the existence of strong open source image understanding models, such as Qwen 2.5 VL bai2025qwen2 , we skip image understanding training stage and build our image generation module directly on Qwen 2.5 VL. In the 8B model, we freeze the Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct backbone and train the diffusion transformers, totaling 1.4 B trainable parameters. The 4B model follows the same image generation architecture but uses Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct as backbone.
items.zh: 我们开发了两种不同规模的模型：基于专有数据训练的8B参数模型和仅使用开源数据的4B参数模型。鉴于存在强大的开源图像理解模型，如Qwen 2.5 VL bai2025qwen2，我们跳过了图像理解训练阶段，直接在Qwen 2.5 VL上构建图像生成模块。在8B模型中，我们冻结Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct主干，训练扩散Transformer，总计1.4B可训练参数。4B模型采用相同的图像生成架构，但使用Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct作为主干。

items.en: We leverage the architecture of the Lumina-Next model zhuo2024lumina for our DiT. The Lumina-Next model is built on the improved Next-DiT architecture, a scalable and efficient diffusion transformer designed for text-to-image and general multimodal generation. It introduces 3D Rotary Position Embedding to encode spatial-temporal structure across time, height, and width without relying on learnable position tokens. Each transformer block employs sandwich normalization (RMSNorm before and after attention/MLP) and Grouped-Query Attention to enhance stability and reduce computation. Based on empirical results, this architecture achieves fast, high-quality generation.
items.zh: 我们利用Lumina-Next模型zhuo2024lumina的架构作为我们的DiT。Lumina-Next模型基于改进的Next-DiT架构构建，这是一种可扩展且高效的扩散Transformer，专为文生图和通用多模态生成设计。它引入了3D旋转位置编码，以编码时间、高度和宽度上的时空结构，而不依赖可学习的位置标记。每个Transformer块采用三明治归一化（注意力/MLP前后的RMSNorm）和分组查询注意力，以增强稳定性并减少计算量。基于实证结果，该架构实现了快速、高质量的生成。

items.en: For 8B model, we combine around 25 million open-source data (CC12M changpinyo2021conceptual , SA-1B kirillov2023segment , and JourneyDB JourneyDB ) with an additional 30 million proprietary images. All image captions are generated by Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct, yielding detailed descriptions with an average length of 120 tokens. To improve generalization to varying prompt lengths, we also include around 10% (6 million) shorter captions with around 20 tokens from CC12M changpinyo2021conceptual . Each image–caption pair is formatted with the prompt: “Please generate an image based on the following caption: <caption>“. For the fully open-source 4B model, we use 25 million publicly available images, from CC12M changpinyo2021conceptual , SA-1B kirillov2023segment , and JourneyDB JourneyDB , each paired with the same detailed captions. We also mix in around 10% (3 million) short captions sourced from CC12M changpinyo2021conceptual . To support the research community, we release 25 million detailed captions and 3 million short captions.
items.zh: 对于8B模型，我们结合了约2500万开源数据（CC12M changpinyo2021conceptual、SA-1B kirillov2023segment和JourneyDB JourneyDB）以及额外的3000万专有图像。所有图像标题均由Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct生成，产生平均长度为120个标记的详细描述。为了提高对不同提示长度的泛化能力，我们还加入了约10%（600万）来自CC12M changpinyo2021conceptual的较短标题（约20个标记）。每个图像-标题对使用提示“请根据以下标题生成图像：<标题>”格式化。对于完全开源的4B模型，我们使用了2500万张公开可用的图像，来自CC12M changpinyo2021conceptual、SA-1B kirillov2023segment和JourneyDB JourneyDB，每张图像配以相同的详细标题。我们还混合了约10%（300万）来自CC12M changpinyo2021conceptual的短标题。为了支持研究社区，我们发布了2500万详细标题和300万短标题。

items.en: After the image generation pre-training stage, we observe several weaknesses in the model:
items.zh: 在图像生成预训练阶段之后，我们观察到模型存在若干弱点：

items.en: Generate complex human gestures, e.g. One person is nocking an arrow.
items.zh: 生成复杂的人类手势，例如“一个人正在搭箭”。

items.en: Generate common objects, such as various fruits and vegetables.
items.zh: 生成常见物体，例如各种水果和蔬菜。

items.en: Generate landmarks, for example, Golden Gate Bridge.
items.zh: 生成地标，例如金门大桥。

items.en: Generate simple text, e.g. The word ‘Salesforce’ written on a street surface.
items.zh: 生成简单文本，例如写在路面上的单词“Salesforce”。

items.en: Although these categories were intended to be covered during pretraining, the limited size of our pretraining corpus meant they weren’t adequately addressed. To remedy this, we perform instruction tuning focused specifically on these domains. For each category, we prompt GPT-4o to generate roughly 10k prompt–image pairs, creating a targeted dataset that improves the model’s ability to handle these cases. To improve visual aesthetics quality, we also expand our data with prompts drawn from JourneyDB JourneyDB and DALL·E 3. This process yields a curated collection of approximately 60k high quality prompt–image pairs. We also release this 60k instruction tuning dataset.
items.zh: 尽管这些类别本应在预训练中涵盖，但预训练语料库规模有限，导致它们未能得到充分处理。为此，我们专门针对这些领域进行了指令微调。对于每个类别，我们提示GPT-4o生成大约1万个提示-图像对，创建了一个有针对性的数据集，以提高模型处理这些情况的能力。为了提升视觉美学质量，我们还从JourneyDB JourneyDB和DALL·E 3中扩展了数据。这一过程产生了约6万个高质量提示-图像对的精选集合。我们还发布了这6万个指令微调数据集。

items.en: For baseline comparison, we include the following unified models: EMU2 Chat sun2024generative , Chameleon team2024chameleon , Seed-X ge2024seed , VILA-U wu2024vila , LMfusion shi2024llamafusion , Show-o xie2024show , EMU3 wang2024emu3 , MetaMorph tong2024metamorph , TokenFlow qu2024tokenflow , Janus wu2024janus , and Janus-Pro chen2025janus .
items.zh: 作为基线比较，我们包括以下统一模型：EMU2 Chat sun2024generative、Chameleon team2024chameleon、Seed-X ge2024seed、VILA-U wu2024vila、LMfusion shi2024llamafusion、Show-o xie2024show、EMU3 wang2024emu3、MetaMorph tong2024metamorph、TokenFlow qu2024tokenflow、Janus wu2024janus和Janus-Pro chen2025janus。

items.en: In the image understanding task, we evaluate the benchmark performance on VQAv2 goyal2017making , MMBench liu2023mmbench , SeedBench (li2023seed, ), MM-Vet yu2023mm , MME-Perception and MME-Cognition fu2024mme , MMMU yue2024mmmu , TextVQA singh2019towards , and RealWorldQA grok15v . As shown in Table 1, our BLIP3-o 8B achieves the best performance in most benchmarks.
items.zh: 在图像理解任务中，我们在VQAv2 goyal2017making、MMBench liu2023mmbench、SeedBench (li2023seed, )、MM-Vet yu2023mm、MME-Perception和MME-Cognition fu2024mme、MMMU yue2024mmmu、TextVQA singh2019towards和RealWorldQA grok15v上评估基准性能。如表1所示，我们的BLIP3-o 8B在大多数基准测试中取得了最佳性能。

items.en: In the image generation benchmark, we report GenEval ghosh2023geneval and DPG-Bench hu2024ella to measure prompt alignment, WISE niu2025wise to evaluate world knowledge reasoning capability. As shown in Table 2, BLIP3-o 8B achieves a GenEval score of 0.84, a WISE score of 0.62, but scores lower on DPG-Bench. Because model-based evaluation for DPG-Bench can be unreliable, we complement these results with a human study on all DPG-Bench prompts in the next section. Furthermore, we also find our instruction tuning dataset BLIP3o-60k yields immediate gains: using only 60k prompt–image pairs, both prompt alignment and visual aesthetics improve markedly, and many generation artifacts are quickly reduced. Although this instruction tuning dataset cannot fully resolve some difficult cases, such as complex human gestures generation, it nonetheless delivers a substantial boost in overall image quality.
items.zh: 在图像生成基准测试中，我们报告GenEval ghosh2023geneval和DPG-Bench hu2024ella以衡量提示对齐，WISE niu2025wise以评估世界知识推理能力。如表2所示，BLIP3-o 8B的GenEval得分为0.84，WISE得分为0.62，但在DPG-Bench上得分较低。由于基于模型的DPG-Bench评估可能不可靠，我们在下一节中对所有DPG-Bench提示进行了人工研究以补充这些结果。此外，我们还发现我们的指令微调数据集BLIP3o-60k带来了立竿见影的效果：仅使用6万个提示-图像对，提示对齐和视觉美学质量都显著提升，许多生成伪影迅速减少。尽管这个指令微调数据集无法完全解决某些困难情况，例如复杂手势生成，但它仍然在整体图像质量上带来了显著提升。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Human study results for DPG-Bench between Janus Pro and our model.
items.capZh: 图6：Janus Pro与我们的模型在DPG-Bench上的人工研究结果。

items.en: In this section, we conduct a human evaluation comparing BLIP3-o 8B and Janus Pro 7B on about 1,000 prompts drawn from the DPG-Bench. For each prompt, annotators compare image pairs side by side on two metrics:
items.zh: 在本节中，我们对BLIP3-o 8B和Janus Pro 7B在来自DPG-Bench的约1000个提示上进行了人工评估。对于每个提示，标注者根据两个指标并排比较图像对：

items.en: Visual Quality: the instruction is “All images were generated from the same text input using different methods. Please select the BEST image you prefer based on visual appeal, such as layout, clarity, object shapes, and overall cleanliness.”
items.zh: 视觉质量：指令为“所有图像均使用不同方法从相同文本输入生成。请根据视觉吸引力（如布局、清晰度、物体形状和整体整洁度）选择您认为最佳的图像。”

items.en: Prompt Alignment: the instruction is “All images were generated from the same text input using different methods. Please select the image with the BEST image-text content alignment.”
items.zh: 提示对齐：指令为“所有图像均使用不同方法从相同文本输入生成。请选择图像-文本内容对齐最佳的图像。”

items.en: Each metric was assessed in two separate rounds, resulting in roughly 3,000 judgments per criterion. As illustrated in Figure 6, BLIP3-o outperforms Janus Pro on both visual quality and prompt alignment, even though Janus Pro achieves a higher DPG score in Table 2. The pp-values for Visual Quality and Prompt Alignment are 5.05e-06 and 1.16e-05, respectively, indicating that our model significantly outperforms Janus Pro with high statistical confidence.
items.zh: 每个指标分两轮独立评估，每个标准产生约3000个判断。如图6所示，尽管Janus Pro在表2中获得了更高的DPG分数，但BLIP3-o在视觉质量和提示对齐方面均优于Janus Pro。视觉质量和提示对齐的p值分别为5.05e-06和1.16e-05，表明我们的模型以高统计置信度显著优于Janus Pro。

items.en: We are currently extending our unified multimodal to downstream tasks such as image editing, multi-turn visual dialogue, and interleaved generation. As a first step, we will focus on image reconstruction: feeding images into the image understanding vision encoder and then reconstructing them via the image generation model, to seamlessly bridge image understanding and generation. Building on this capability, we will collect instruction tuning datasets to adapt the model to various downstream applications.
items.zh: 我们目前正在将统一多模态模型扩展到下游任务，如图像编辑、多轮视觉对话和交错生成。作为第一步，我们将专注于图像重建：将图像输入图像理解视觉编码器，然后通过图像生成模型重建图像，以无缝桥接图像理解和生成。基于这一能力，我们将收集指令微调数据集，使模型适应各种下游应用。

items.en: Recent studies have highlighted unified multimodal, capable of both image understanding and generation, as a promising avenue of research. For example, SEED-X ge2024seed , Emu-2 sun2024generative , and MetaMorph tong2024metamorph train image features via regression losses, while Chameleon team2024chameleon , Show-o xie2024show , EMU3 wang2024emu3 , and Janus wu2024janus ; chen2025janus adopt an autoregressive discrete token prediction paradigm. In parallel, DreamLLM dong2023dreamllm and Transfusion zhou2024transfusion leverage diffusion objectives for visual generation. To our knowledge, we present the first systematic study of design choice in the autoregressive and diffusion framework.
items.zh: 最近的研究强调了统一多模态（能够同时进行图像理解和生成）是一个有前景的研究方向。例如，SEED-X ge2024seed、Emu-2 sun2024generative 和 MetaMorph tong2024metamorph 通过回归损失训练图像特征，而 Chameleon team2024chameleon、Show-o xie2024show、EMU3 wang2024emu3 和 Janus wu2024janus; chen2025janus 采用自回归离散词元预测范式。同时，DreamLLM dong2023dreamllm 和 Transfusion zhou2024transfusion 利用扩散目标进行视觉生成。据我们所知，我们首次对自回归和扩散框架中的设计选择进行了系统研究。

items.en: Regrading to the unifed model training strategy, LMFusion shi2024llamafusion builds on the frozen MLLM backbone while incorporating transformer modules for image generation using Transfusion zhou2024transfusion . A key similarity between our approach and LMFusion is that both methods freeze the MLLM backbone and train only the image-specific components. However, LMFusion incorporates parallel transformer modules for image diffusion, significantly expanding the model size. In contrast, our method introduces a relatively lightweight diffusion head to enable image generation, maintaining a more manageable overall model size. Concurrent work MetaQuery pan2025transfer also uses learnable queries to bridge frozen pre-trained MLLMs with pre-trained diffusion models, but the diffusion models are in VAE + Flow Matching strategy instead of the more efficient CLIP + Flow Matching one in our BLIP3-o.
items.zh: 关于统一模型训练策略，LMFusion shi2024llamafusion 基于冻结的 MLLM 骨干网络，同时使用 Transfusion zhou2024transfusion 方法引入 Transformer 模块进行图像生成。我们的方法与 LMFusion 的一个关键相似之处在于，两种方法都冻结了 MLLM 骨干网络，仅训练图像特定组件。然而，LMFusion 引入了用于图像扩散的并行 Transformer 模块，显著扩大了模型规模。相比之下，我们的方法引入了一个相对轻量级的扩散头来实现图像生成，保持了更易于管理的整体模型规模。同时期的工作 MetaQuery pan2025transfer 也使用可学习查询来桥接冻结的预训练 MLLM 与预训练扩散模型，但其扩散模型采用 VAE + Flow Matching 策略，而不是我们 BLIP3-o 中更高效的 CLIP + Flow Matching 策略。

items.en: In summary, we have presented the first systematic exploration of hybrid autoregressive and diffusion architectures for unified multimodal modeling, evaluating three critical aspects: image representation (CLIP vs. VAE features), training objective (Flow Matching vs. MSE), and training strategy (joint vs. sequential). Our experiments demonstrate that CLIP embeddings paired with a flow matching loss deliver both faster training efficiency and higher quality outputs. Building on these insights, we introduce BLIP3-o, a family of state-of-the-art unified models enhanced with a 60k instruction tuning dataset BLIP3o-60k that substantially improves prompt alignment and visual aesthetics. We are actively working on applications for the unified model, including iterative image editing, visual dialogue, and step-by-step visual reasoning.
items.zh: 总之，我们首次系统探索了用于统一多模态建模的混合自回归和扩散架构，评估了三个关键方面：图像表示（CLIP 与 VAE 特征）、训练目标（Flow Matching 与 MSE）和训练策略（联合与顺序）。我们的实验表明，CLIP 嵌入结合 Flow Matching 损失既能实现更快的训练效率，又能产生更高质量的输出。基于这些见解，我们推出了 BLIP3-o，这是一系列最先进的统一模型，并通过 60k 指令微调数据集 BLIP3o-60k 进行了增强，显著改善了提示对齐和视觉美学。我们正在积极研究统一模型的应用，包括迭代图像编辑、视觉对话和逐步视觉推理。
